requirements: R1: leads_to(tree, 'collect personal data', 'send email notification')
R2: executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service')
R4: leads_to(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
R5: leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'determine loan risk level')
R6: executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor')
R8: executed_by(tree, 'check risks acceptable', 'branch office manager')
R9: leads_to(tree, 'check risks acceptable', 'approve request') or leads_to(tree, 'check risks acceptable', 'reject request')
R12: max_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close offer', '7 working days')
R15: condition_directly_follows(tree, 'loanRequestCredit > 1000000 and supervisorCheckPerformed == false', 'create suspense file')
R18: data_leads_to_absence(tree, 'customerStatus == "gold" and loanRequestAmount < 1000000', 'evaluate loan risk')
